notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes a public battle between 刘长 and 黑楼兰 (under alias 黑月), which is an open conflict observed by multiple onlookers. All events (challenge, fight, victory, wager fulfillment) are publicly visible events, not hidden knowledge. No private motives, secret plans, future-known information, or knowledge gaps are directly supported by the source pointers. The entities' descriptions (刘长 as 北原正道七转强者, 黑楼兰 as 女仙化名黑月) are also publicly known or ambiguous. No fact qualifies as hidden/future-known/player-visibility under the strict criteria.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
黑楼兰与刘长战斗的行为可见（ptr_12, ptr_13, ptr_14），但动机模糊。黑楼兰化名黑月连续挑战强者（ptr_5），但种子未直接说明她挑战刘长的具体动机（是为报前仇、历练、还是其他目的）。刘长公开挑战黑楼兰是为报前仇（relation），但黑楼兰接受挑战的动机不明确。仅能观察到战斗行为，无法做出一步推断而不陷入心理猜测。
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
刘家作为北原正道家族，其成员刘长公开挑战黑楼兰却被击败并昏迷，刘家履行赌约交出元境，家族声誉受损。刘长、刘萝均为刘家蛊仙，刘家作为集体actor有明确 stake。压力轴为家族声誉/资源损失，likelyReactions为保守的一步反应。
IF export filter quarantined 7 legacy old-schema branches.
